author: Sai
name: 11L SparseMLP + Late Attention Precision (1xH100 Local)
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 local experiment: 11L + XSA(last 4) + EMA(0.997) + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + Late QAT, with sparse MLP channel masks and late attention exported at higher precision. Final roundtrip val_bpb improved vs the dense local baseline while remaining under the dense artifact size.
